speaker: Argo
text: Should I invite Professor Derich...?
*The bath on the stern of the ship is definitely a sight to behold.*

speaker: Unknown
text: *Hot water pours out of it even though it’s on a ship, and the surface ripples in synch with the ship’s rocking.*
It’s as if a piece of the sea cut itself out and floated up. To me, this is the height of elegance and luxury. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: What do you think? Isn’t this the greatest!? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I love it! The sound of the waves and the rocking are so relaxing…

speaker: Argo
text: A hot bath and the refreshing sea breeze... I've never felt this before! *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Heh heh heh, I know, right? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: I wanted to give you a chance to try this out. *

speaker: Argo
text: Oh? Then all this really is for me…

speaker: Diederich
text: Hey, I didn't plan all this just for you. I’m just bein’ a good professor who wants you to have a learnin’ experience. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: You’ll have lots of opportunities to go out to sea when you’re a knight. It’s best to get used to it now while you’re a student.*…*

speaker: Argo
text: That’s true.

speaker: Argo
text: Do you travel on this ship a lot? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Well, Baten and I used to hang out pretty often. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Was that before you became a pirate?

speaker: Diederich
text: No, it was back when I was one. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Wait... So that means Lord Baten...

speaker: Diederich
text: Well, it’s a long story.

speaker: Argo
text: *sigh*
